language.restart_required: Restart required to apply language changes

resourceGuide.title: Agent management moved to Resource Library
resourceGuide.description: Agents, models, executors, skills, and retrievers are now managed in Resource Library.

navigation.personalResourcesDescription: Managing agents, models, executors, skills, and retrievers owned by you.
navigation.groupResourcesDescription: Select a group to manage shared resources in that group.

skills.search_skills_description: Search and install skills from various skill markets
skills.search_hint: Enter keywords to search for skills

allowed_models.label: Restrict Available Models
allowed_models.description: When enabled, users can only select from the models listed below

errors.default_model_required_when_restrict: A default model must be selected when model restriction is enabled
errors.default_model_must_be_in_allowed: The default model must be in the allowed models list

simple.advanced_description: Collaboration modes, multi-bot orchestration, and detailed role settings live here.
simple.advanced_toggle_description: Switch to the full configuration UI for collaboration modes and multi-bot orchestration.
simple.non_solo_notice: This agent uses an advanced collaboration mode, so the full configuration is shown.

core.model_description: Uses the system default when unset; choose one only when needed.
core.prompt_description: Defines the agent role, goals, and response style.
core.skills_description: Add common skills so the agent can call tools when needed.
core.knowledge_description: New chats start with these knowledge bases; more can still be added in chat.
core.mcp_description: Connect external MCP services to add tool capabilities.

execution.bind_mode_description: Controls which entry points and task types can use this agent.
execution.requires_workspace_description: When enabled, code tasks must start with a repository.
execution.executor_description: Controls the runtime environment used to handle tasks.

chat.title: Chat
chat.description: Use for Q&A, document discussion, and ongoing conversation.

code.title: Code
code.description: Use for development, fixes, and reviews inside a code repository.

task.title: Device
task.description: Use for tasks that need a local device or execution environment.

executor.title: Executor
executor.requires_complex_hint: Code and device modes need Claude Code capability, so the complex executor is preferred.
executor.manage_custom_shells_hint: Manage custom executors in Resource Library - Executors.

simple.title: Simple
simple.description: Uses the Chat executor for conversation and lightweight Q&A.

complex.title: Complex
complex.description: Complex executor for code tasks, device tasks, or multi-step complex tasks.

custom.title: Custom
custom.description: Uses an executor you created for a specialized runtime.
